examples: He spoke offhandedly, making it clear I had no say in the matter.
She had made these remarks offhandedly.
I was walking offhandedly in a busy street when I felt someone staring at me.
Offhandedly, I was looking to make a gift of a book tied to the Tintin movie.
It's a partnership that probably came together over champagne brunch at Jay-Z's, but its synth-fuzz groove is offhandedly seductive.
